mapper.select: select p.id, p.name, p.total_score, p.duration_minutes, count(pq.id) as question_count, p.updated_at from paper p left join paper_question pq on pq.paper_id = p.id and pq.deleted = 0 where group by p.id, p.name, p.total_score, p.duration_minutes, p.updated_at order by p.id asc limit #{pageSize} offset #{offset}
select count(1) from paper p where

select p.id, p.name, p.description, p.duration_minutes, p.total_score, count(pq.id) as question_count, p.remark, p.updated_at from paper p left join paper_question pq on pq.paper_id = p.id and pq.deleted = 0 where p.id = #{paperId} and p.deleted = 0 group by p.id, p.name, p.description, p.duration_minutes, p.total_score, p.remark, p.updated_at
